results.title: About Us | TÜRKKEP | Leading Registered Electronic Delivery
results.description: TÜRKKEP, is Turkey’s leading registered electronic delivery, qualified electronic signature, secure electronic archiving and e-invoicing services provider, authorised and audited by the Turkish ICT Authority and the Turkish Revenue Administration since 2013.
